title: dioscorea humilis subsp. polyanthes
intro: Dioscorea humilis subsp. polyanthes, also known as the wild yam, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family and is native to the Americas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to balance hormonal fluctuations and alleviate menstrual cramps, making it a popular natural remedy for women's health issues. The health benefits of Dioscorea humilis subsp. polyanthes include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
